summary: Matrix recording with solid sound, celebrated as the definitive version of the tour’s top show.
review: Both reviewers praise this performance, calling it the best show of the tour and the definitive source. The tape is a matrix (mtx) recording; while one fan notes that an all‑digital set‑one version now exists, the existing mix is still regarded as good enough to be the go‑to reference.

ai_rating.rationale: One 5‑star endorsement and a neutral comment about the source suggest a high‑quality show; limited detail on audio leaves some uncertainty, yielding medium confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix (soundboard + audience) tape; later all‑digital set‑one version exists, implying this mix is solid but not the cleanest possible.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on individual songs or pacing; reviewers simply label it the tour’s best show.
